prompt: An immense weathered hand guides a monumental fountain pen crafted from polished ebony and aged brass across an infinite expanse of richly textured maritime parchment, framed in a dramatic vertical 9:16 composition. From the pen’s oversized nib pours a stream of midnight indigo ink that transforms the page into the legendary depths of Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea. Tiny Captain Nemo commands the Nautilus as it cuts through freshly formed ink oceans, colossal squid arms coil upward from swirling currents, intricate coral kingdoms bloom from the paper’s fibers, miniature shoals of fish glide through liquid ink channels, divers investigate forgotten underwater ruins, and enigmatic deep-sea creatures emerge from shadowy ink vortices. The flowing ink behaves like a living ocean, expanding organically across the parchment. Extreme macro perspective emphasizes the giant pen nib grazing the paper surface, with individual fibers absorbing the ink like tides soaking into sand. Warm lantern gold illumination mingles with abyssal blue hues, creating a cinematic atmosphere of wonder and exploration. Hyper-realistic storytelling, breathtaking miniature details, ultra-photorealistic textures, masterful depth, 8K resolution, vertical masterpiece 9:16

prompt: A vertical Father's Day tribute collage designed on a warm, rustic cream-colored background with scrapbook elements, delicate leaf illustrations, and soft heart accents. At the very top, a banner reads "HAPPY FATHER'S DAY" above a large central image of a smiling father in his 40s carrying his young son and daughter on his shoulders, captioned "HERO. MENTOR. FRIEND. WE LOVE YOU, DAD!". A central circular emblem reads "A TRIBUTE TO DAD." Below the main header, the collage is split into smaller rectangular panels showing different stages of a father's love and hard work: teaching a young daughter to ride a bicycle, working diligently with his son in a woodworking shop, tenderly cradling his newborn baby, and playfully dancing with his kids in the living room. The bottom section concludes the timeline with two panels showing the father as an older adult, proudly embracing his grown-up children at their college graduation and sharing a joyful dinner laugh with his adult son and daughter. Each panel features a heartfelt caption like "YOUR GUIDANCE," "YOUR HARD WORK FOR US," "UNCONDITIONAL LOVE," "THE FUN & JOY," "ALWAYS SUPPORTING US," and "OUR BIGGEST CHAMPION. HAPPY FATHER'S DAY!".

画面为俯拍加轻微斜角透视，一张米白色古风服饰手稿纸夹在木质画板上，放在温暖木色设计工作台。主体是一位成年中国古装武侠美人，从纸面服饰设计稿中自然苏醒。

人物参考【角色名称】，整体气质参考苏有朋版《倚天屠龙记》的经典人物感觉，保留传统武侠电视剧的人物神韵、情绪辨识度与服装语言。人物五官精致写实，皮肤自然，眼神有戏，神态带有【情绪关键词】。整体气质为【人物气质】。

服装方向为【服装主题】，主色调为【主色调】，辅色调为【辅色调】。服装材质包含【材质关键词】。服装应带有经典武侠剧的真实布料感和角色归属感，避免过度仙侠化与网游风。

表现方式为“纸上成真”效果。上半身与上半段服装为完整写实成品，衣料有真实光泽、褶皱、刺绣、层叠与配饰细节。下半身裙摆逐渐过渡为淡彩服饰手稿，保留铅笔结构线、裙褶线、腰封结构、披帛走势、裙摆动态与局部淡彩上色。裙摆底部、一侧下摆或鞋尖附近保留少量未完成铅笔素描。

纸面加入少量专业服饰设计标注，包含英文标注【英文标注】与中文标注【中文标注】。标注排版自然清晰，像高级服装设计稿，避免乱码。

桌面加入与角色身份呼应的小物件：【角色道具】。工作台上还可出现布料小样、色卡、铅笔、针管笔、玉饰、发簪、小型手稿卡片与茶杯。右下角有一只真实手持铅笔继续绘制，形成角色从手稿中醒来的破次元幻觉。

整体风格为写实摄影感，高级东方审美，经典武侠人物写真感，服饰设计稿反差感，真实纸张纹理，准确阴影，干净构图，电影级柔光。画面精致，人物清晰，质感高级。

避免卡通脸、动漫脸、塑料皮肤、现代时装感过强、过度游戏风、文字乱码、人体比例错误、手部异常、下半身完全灰白、上下割裂、桌面元素杂乱无序。

prompt: A young male stands centered facing the camera in a straight-on perspective, wearing an unbuttoned white long-sleeve linen shirt. He features a neat goatee and a short, matte-finish textured French crop, with the top approximately two inches long displaying a natural wavy and curly texture complete with slight, realistic flyaways, tapering cleanly into skin-faded sides. His facial expression is serious and confidently posed, with a neutral mouth, relaxed eyebrows, and a direct, unwavering gaze. His shoulders are level, leading down to hands deliberately clasped in relaxed tension at his waist, where his left hand rests smoothly over his right to showcase a polished silver watch with a green dial, while his right hand cradles dark sunglasses underneath. He stands directly on dark brown, rippled wet sand, anchoring the deep spatial depth of the scene. In the midground, a dominant expanse of calm, rippled dark blue-gray sea stretches outward, catching the reflections of the setting sun, while the hazy background features slightly blurred, silhouetted mountain landmasses framing the left and right edges of the horizon beneath a smooth gradient sky. The serene atmosphere is defined by natural mixed lighting, blending a warm golden sunset backlight with a diffused front reflector fill. This soft, moderate-intensity light creates a low-contrast, flat illumination over the subject, casting only faint, short shadows beneath his shirt collar and fabric folds, while laying subtle specular highlights across the rippling water and horizon. The complementary color palette beautifully balances the crisp thirty-five percent white of his shirt against the thirty-five percent blue-gray of the ocean and fifteen percent warm peach of the sunset, evoking a calm and clean minimalist mood. Captured as a realistic digital lifestyle portrait using an 85mm lens at f/2.8, 1/250s shutter speed, and ISO 100, the shot keeps the subject tack-sharp against a medium depth of field, with post-processing adding warm color grading on the highlights, lifted shadows, and soft contrast reduction for a smooth, grain-free finish, all beautifully framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

Background is a flawless deep blue cloudless sky. Strong bright overhead-side sunlight creates glowing rim light on hair and shoulders, warm highlights, soft shadows. Sharp focus on face, ultra-detailed hair, gingham texture and vivid flowers. Bright, vibrant, authentic summer iPhone photo with high contrast and natural colors.

prompt:
Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic minimalist black-and-white fine art portrait of the same woman in a professional photography studio. The composition is elegant, timeless, and emotionally warm, inspired by classic portrait photography and luxury editorial magazines.

The woman has medium-length wavy dark hair with soft natural volume, a gentle center part, and delicate face-framing strands. She wears an oversized plain black crewneck 

T-shirt layered over a fitted long-sleeve black top, creating a simple yet sophisticated monochrome aesthetic.

She sits naturally with her hands resting together on her lap, shoulders relaxed, and her head tilted slightly to one side. She wears a soft closed-lip smile, looking directly into the camera with warm, expressive eyes that convey kindness and quiet confidence.

The background is a seamless dark charcoal-gray studio backdrop, free from distractions. Soft diffused key lighting from one side creates smooth gradients across her face while maintaining rich blacks and subtle contrast. The portrait emphasizes realistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, and gentle catchlights in the eyes.

Photographed using a medium-format camera, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, professional monochrome color grading, high dynamic range, museum-quality portrait photography, timeless editorial style, photorealistic rendering, masterpiece quality, and 8K resolution.

Style Keywords

minimal black and white portrait, fine art photography, timeless editorial, monochrome studio portrait, soft smile, medium-format photography, Vogue portrait, cinematic lighting, minimalist aesthetic, photorealistic, ultra detailed, 8K.

Negative Prompt

low quality, blurry, noisy image, distorted face, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, asymmetrical eyes, harsh shadows, cartoon, anime, CGI, watermark, logo, text, oversharpened skin, plastic skin, oversaturated contrast, artifacts, low resolution.
